cover_letter.opening_paragraph: Designing a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system — complete with a server-side routing engine managing 16 specialised agents and a 60% reduction in research-phase token usage — is the kind of engineering challenge that made a career in enterprise-scale software development an obvious next step. The Graduate Program (Software Engineering) at DXC Technology is where I intend to build on that foundation.
cover_letter.connection_paragraph: Designing a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system — complete with a server-side routing engine managing 16 specialised agents and a 60% reduction in research-phase token usage — is the kind of engineering challenge that made a career in enterprise-scale software development an obvious next step. The Graduate Program (Software Engineering) at DXC Technology is where I intend to build on that foundation.
cover_letter.offer_paragraph: At AI Job Application Pipeline, architecting modular agents with defined JSON state contracts and turn-based execution controls demonstrated the same discipline DXC values in its engineers: structured thinking, clean system boundaries, and a drive to eliminate failure points before they surface. Collaborating directly with a senior engineering consultant and Product Owner across a virtual-first environment mirrors the cross-functional model DXC's graduate cohort operates within. Earlier, at Digimaker, breaking down complex programming concepts for 12–20 students per session — and earning a High Distinction for placement performance — confirmed an ability to translate technical depth into clear, communicable decisions under real conditions.
cover_letter.research_paragraph: DXC's expansion of its ANZ Graduate Program with targeted Cloud and AI certification pathways reflects a deliberate investment in early-career engineers who can grow into enterprise complexity, not just graduate from it. My practical AWS experience and exposure to cloud-ready architecture design position me to hit those certification milestones early and contribute meaningfully to the modernisation work DXC's clients depend on.
cover_letter.closing_paragraph: A conversation about how my background aligns with the program's current intake would be the most direct next step — I'm available at short notice.
cover_letter.full_letter:
Pinyjwok Amum
pjamum@gmail.com | 0431-191-158 | Melbourne, VIC | linkedin.com/pinyjwok-amum

2026-05-04

Re: Graduate Program (Software Engineering) — DXC Technology

Dear Hiring Manager,

Designing a 15-phase multi-agent orchestration system — complete with a server-side routing engine managing 16 specialised agents and a 60% reduction in research-phase token usage — is the kind of engineering challenge that made a career in enterprise-scale software development an obvious next step. The Graduate Program (Software Engineering) at DXC Technology is where I intend to build on that foundation.

At AI Job Application Pipeline, architecting modular agents with defined JSON state contracts and turn-based execution controls demonstrated the same discipline DXC values in its engineers: structured thinking, clean system boundaries, and a drive to eliminate failure points before they surface. Collaborating directly with a senior engineering consultant and Product Owner across a virtual-first environment mirrors the cross-functional model DXC's graduate cohort operates within. Earlier, at Digimaker, breaking down complex programming concepts for 12–20 students per session — and earning a High Distinction for placement performance — confirmed an ability to translate technical depth into clear, communicable decisions under real conditions.

DXC's expansion of its ANZ Graduate Program with targeted Cloud and AI certification pathways reflects a deliberate investment in early-career engineers who can grow into enterprise complexity, not just graduate from it. My practical AWS experience and exposure to cloud-ready architecture design position me to hit those certification milestones early and contribute meaningfully to the modernisation work DXC's clients depend on.

A conversation about how my background aligns with the program's current intake would be the most direct next step — I'm available at short notice.

Kind regards,

Pinyjwok Amum

strengths_used: Strong foundational knowledge in software design, development, and testing methodologies.
Design, develop, test, and evaluate IT software components.
Collaborate with senior leaders and cross-functional teams in a virtual-first environment.
Interest in Cloud technologies (Azure/AWS) and Artificial Intelligence.
